channel.title: ALPR Security on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in ALPR Security on simeononsecurity

item.title: Flock Safety Camera Security Vulnerabilities: Critical Analysis of 50+ Discovered Flaws in 2026
item.category: "Security Research" , "Vulnerability Analysis" , "Surveillance Technology" , "Cybersecurity" , "Privacy Security" , "IoT Security" , "Physical Security" , "Network Security" , "Critical Infrastructure" , "Government Technology"
item.description: Comprehensive analysis of 50+ critical security vulnerabilities discovered in Flock Safety ALPR cameras including hardcoded passwords, lack of encryption, unauthorized data collection, and physical access exploits based on independent security research.
